log.message: ✓ TRADE: GPT-4o gives 1 ore, receives 1 brick, 1 wheat from Gemini
✓ TRADE: DeepSeek gives 3 wheat, receives 1 brick from Grok
✓ TRADE: DeepSeek gives 1 sheep, receives 1 ore from Gemini
✓ CONCESSION: Grok pays 1 wheat to DeepSeek

DeepSeek moves robber to -1,0, steals 1 sheep from Gemini: "I accept Grok's concession of 1 wheat. Thanks for keeping things friendly, Grok. Now, to keep the pressure on, I'm placing the robber on the ore hex at -1,0 and stealing from Gemini. Gemini, hand over a resource—let's see what you've got."
✓ TRADE: GPT-4o gives 1 ore, receives 2 wheat from Grok
✓ CONCESSION: DeepSeek pays 1 brick to Gemini
Gemini moves robber to 0,2, steals 1 wheat from Grok: "Thanks DeepSeek, I'll take the brick!"

Grok moves robber to 1,0, steals 1 ore from GPT-4o: "Sorry, Gemini, I’m not taking your ore this time. GPT-4o, I need that wheat, so I’m moving the robber to your ore hex at 1,0. Let’s see what I can snag from you!"
✓ TRADE: Grok gives 1 ore, receives 1 brick from Gemini
DeepSeek plays KNIGHT — robber negotiation begins
✓ CONCESSION: Grok pays 1 ore to DeepSeek

DeepSeek moves robber to -1,0, steals 1 wheat from GPT-4o: "Thanks for the ore, Grok—I appreciate our partnership. Now, GPT-4o, I'm moving the robber to your ore hex at -1,0. Your ore production has been strong, and I need to balance the board. Let's see what I can take."
✓ TRADE (revised): DeepSeek gives 1 wheat, 1 ore, receives 1 brick, 1 ore from Grok
✓ TRADE: DeepSeek gives 1 brick, receives 1 wood, 1 wheat from GPT-4o
✓ TRADE: GPT-4o gives 1 brick, receives 1 wheat from DeepSeek
✓ TRADE: Grok gives 2 wood, 1 ore, receives 1 brick from DeepSeek
✓ TRADE: Grok gives 1 wheat, receives 1 wood from DeepSeek
✓ TRADE (revised): DeepSeek gives 1 wheat, receives 1 sheep, 1 ore from Gemini
✓ CONCESSION: Gemini pays 1 ore to GPT-4o
GPT-4o moves robber to 0,0, steals 1 wheat from Gemini: "Thank you, Gemini. I'll make sure the robber moves to a spot that's beneficial to the game state. Let's keep it competitive!"
✓ TRADE: GPT-4o gives 1 ore, receives 1 wood, 1 brick from Grok
✓ TRADE: Gemini gives 1 brick, 1 wheat, receives 2 wood, 1 sheep from DeepSeek
✓ TRADE (revised): Grok gives 1 ore, receives 1 wood from GPT-4o
✓ TRADE: DeepSeek gives 1 brick, receives 2 wood, 1 sheep from Gemini
GPT-4o plays KNIGHT — robber negotiation begins
✓ CONCESSION: Grok pays 1 ore to GPT-4o
GPT-4o moves robber to -1,1, steals 1 wheat from DeepSeek: "Thanks, Grok. I'll keep my word and avoid your wheat. I'll place the robber elsewhere."
✓ CONCESSION: Grok pays 1 ore to Gemini
Gemini moves robber to 1,0, steals 1 ore from GPT-4o: "I'm placing the robber on the ore at 1,0."
✓ TRADE: Grok gives 2 wood, receives 1 brick from Gemini
✓ TRADE: Grok gives 2 wood, receives 1 wheat from DeepSeek
✓ TRADE: Grok gives 1 brick, receives 1 sheep from DeepSeek
✓ TRADE (revised): DeepSeek gives 1 wheat, receives 1 wood, 1 ore from Gemini
✓ TRADE: GPT-4o gives 4 ore, receives 1 brick, 1 wheat from DeepSeek
✓ TRADE: Grok gives 2 wood, receives 1 ore from Gemini
Gemini plays KNIGHT — robber negotiation begins
✓ CONCESSION: Grok pays 1 ore to Gemini
Gemini moves robber to 0,-2, steals 1 sheep from DeepSeek: "Thanks for the ore, Grok. Sorry DeepSeek, but I need to make strategic decisions."
Grok plays KNIGHT — robber negotiation begins

Grok moves robber to 2,-2, steals 1 wheat from Gemini: "Gemini, I appreciate the offer, but I’ve decided to place the robber on your wheat at 2,-2. I need to slow down your growth to protect my own strategy. Let’s keep negotiating in future turns if you want to avoid further disruptions. DeepSeek and GPT-4o, thanks for your offers, but I’m focusing elsewhere for now."
DeepSeek plays Year of Plenty → gains wheat + brick
✓ TRADE (revised): Gemini gives 2 sheep, receives 1 ore from Grok
✓ TRADE (revised): Gemini gives 3 wood, receives 1 brick from GPT-4o
✓ TRADE: Grok gives 2 wood, 1 sheep, receives 1 brick from DeepSeek
